description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 최대 체력이 가장 높은 아군의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で最大HPが最も高い味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使生命值上限最高的友军行动值增加<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>와 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 증가시킵니다.\n공격 후 최대 체력이 가장 높은 아군의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>と<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>をUPさせる。\n攻撃後、最大HPが最も高い味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>和<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n攻击后,使生命值上限最高的我方<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy, and grants all allies <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. Barrier Strength increases based on the target's Max Health.\nAfter attacking, reduces all of the target's <color=#28d9ed>Unique Resource</color>. (Ignores the target's Resilience and Immunity)
description.kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 부여합니다. 실드량은 대상 최대 체력에 비례하여 증가합니다.\n공격 후 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원</color>의 수량을 모두 감소시킵니다. (대상의 효과 저항 및 면역 무시)
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え,<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>と<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を付与する。シールド量は対象の最大HPが高いほどUPする。\n攻撃後、対象が保有している<color=#28d9ed>固有資源</color>の数量をすべてDOWNさせる。(対象の効果抵抗及び免疫無視)
description.zh: 攻击敌人,赋予全体友军<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>和<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。护盾量会根据目标生命值上限比例增加。\n攻击后,会减少目标附带的所有<color=#28d9ed>固有资源</color>数量。(无视目标的效果抵抗和免疫)
